description: This file implements an in-memory workflow state machine with functions to create, transition, start, cancel, fail, succeed, and retrieve workflows. It enforces allowed state transitions and simulates workflow execution with scheduled status updates.

methods.name: _nowIso
methods.description: Returns the current date/time in ISO string format.

methods.name: _set
methods.description: Stores a workflow record in the in-memory Map.

methods.name: _get
methods.description: Retrieves a workflow record by ID from the in-memory Map.

methods.name: _isValidStatus
methods.description: Checks if a status value is valid within the defined workflow statuses.

methods.name: _isAllowedTransition
methods.description: Checks if a transition from one status to another is allowed based on the defined state machine.

methods.name: _makeInvalidTransitionError
methods.description: Creates an error object for invalid workflow state transitions.

methods.name: createWorkflow
methods.description: Creates a new workflow record with initial status 'queued' and default steps.

methods.name: transitionWorkflow
methods.description: Transitions a workflow to a new status, enforcing the state machine rules, and applies optional patches.

methods.name: startWorkflow
methods.description: Simulates starting a workflow, scheduling status updates over time with enforced state transitions.

methods.name: cancelWorkflow
methods.description: Cancels a workflow if it is not already in a terminal state.

methods.name: failWorkflow
methods.description: Marks a workflow as failed, optionally with additional details.

methods.name: getWorkflow
methods.description: Retrieves a workflow record by ID.

methods.name: getWorkflowStatus
methods.description: Provides a polling-friendly status projection of a workflow.
